concept: Selo de ancoragem: uma semente de diamante cobalt abre quatro pinos dourados, lança um tether violeta, fixa um selo hexagonal e termina como emblema de âncora.
selectionRationale: Entrega nova de power-up, distinta de aegis comet, charge orb, speed, shield, regen pulse, portal rift, chrono tesseract, prism ascension e echo sigil por representar estabilidade gravitacional com pinos, tether e selo de chão.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 4x4 sprite sheet for a Bomba PvP power-up VFX. Primary request: create a coherent sixteen-frame animation of a void anchor power-up, arranged as a clean 4x4 grid in row-major order. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor, or reflections. Subject: a compact cobalt diamond seed with a visible cyan spark appears in frame 00, unfolds four short gold-tipped anchor pins, drops a violet tether below, forms a small dark-blue hexagonal anchor seal with cyan orbit lines, pulses once, then retracts the pins and settles as a floating blue-gold anchor emblem. Style/medium: polished high-contrast game VFX, crisp cel-shaded 2.5D illustration, readable at small runtime size, consistent scale and lighting across all frames. Composition/framing: one centered effect per cell, generous padding, no overlap between cells, no clipping. Lighting/mood: stabilizing, tactical, premium arcade power-up feedback. Color palette: deep cobalt, electric cyan, violet, warm gold, white highlights. Constraints: sixteen distinct sequential poses; every cell must contain a visible non-empty effect; frame 00 tiny seed spark, frames 01-04 anchor pins unfold, frames 05-08 tether and seal assemble, frames 09-12 pulse and stabilize, frames 13-15 pins retract and emblem settles; do not use #00ff00 in the subject. Avoid: text, UI, characters, weapons, logos, generic flame, smoke clouds, circular fireballs, water, extra objects, gradients or variation in the chroma-key background, watermark.

source.note: source-upscaled-2048.png é derivado por Lanczos e não uma fonte nativa 2048px

pipeline.alphaPreparation: remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key border, soft-matte, despill e edge-contract 1
pipeline.frameExtraction: ImageMagick: source-grid-1248 dividido em 16 células 232px, recortadas com margem interna de 40px, redimensionadas para 240px e centralizadas em 312px

animation.alpha: RGBA; fundo chroma-key removido; borda interna transparente

delegation.request: Conferir grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas sem tocar em outros paths, instalar ou fazer git.
delegation.result: Invocação feita no diretório exclusivo; o wrapper encerrou com falha após reportar o escopo, sem gerar arquivos e sem produzir validação utilizável.
delegation.imagine: Não disponível no ambiente Grok; a fonte foi criada pelo image_gen integrado.
delegation.fallback: Extração, organização e validação concluídas localmente com ImageMagick.

validation.commandResult: frames=16 empty=0 edgeHits=0 badDims=0 sourceSheet=1248x1248 runtimeSheet=1024x1024 contactSheet=1024x1024 gifFrames=16 timingCentiseconds=6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6,6
